channel.title: PickleSpot PH - News & Updates
channel.description: Pickleball tournaments, events, news, and court updates across the Philippines.

item.title: PickleSpot PH Launches — Find Pickleball Courts Across the Philippines
item.description: PickleSpot PH is now live! Browse courts by region, book directly with owners, and connect with the growing pickleball community in the Philippines.
